sha_binding.verified_source_note: Second substantive audit repair commit, fixing two Codex P2 findings (forbidden-glob count, retired proof-auditor-gate.yml reference). Rebound 2026-07-21 after a main-sync rebase onto current main (branch was 30 commits behind, missing scripts/ops/executor-result-validate.ts, which was failing the Executor Result Validator with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND): this SHA is the rebased equivalent of the prior verified_source_sha acd1228414f60bf0528294f642137b40394daf01 (identical commit message and audit-doc diff), confirmed by `git merge-base --is-ancestor` to be an ancestor of the current head, whereas the prior SHA no longer is. All later commits are restricted to this lane's proof and manifest paths.

verifier.note: This bundle records mechanical checks only. It is not independent Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 owner artifact.

pnpm_verify.note: Static checks, unit suites, live DB smoke, and the live T1 proof command completed successfully. One unrelated bounded-dedup assertion was explicitly skipped because provider data is stale; the full gate exited 0.

scope_assertions: Lane path eligibility is explicitly distinguished from Delegation Policy authority.
Every recommendation preserves both t1-approved and a valid Griff-authored head-bound pm-verdict/v1.
No override-label or single-artifact T1 approval route is recommended.
Branch-protection claims are a dated point-in-time snapshot.
Shared Griff and Claude identity is explicitly non-independent.

runtime_proof.note: Required T1 smoke evidence only; this audit changes no runtime or database behavior and performs no production mutation outside the existing self-cleaning test suite.

queries.description: Created and read a smoke pick through repository abstractions, transitioned it through queued, posted, and settled, then removed the test rows.
Asserted invalid enqueue and settlement paths leave zero forbidden lifecycle rows.
Asserted invalid enqueue creates no row and invalid delivery preserves processing state atomically.
Asserted invalid delivery creates zero receipt rows.
Asserted invalid settlement creates zero rows and correction chains remain additive.
Asserted rejected atomic delivery and settlement paths create zero audit rows.
Checked that external_id, sport, and participant_type keys contain no duplicate player rows.
